description: A staff member finds a young child who is crying and cannot find their parents.

nodes.task_description: The staff member comforts the child and radios guest services with their location and a description of the child.
The staff member escorts the child to the nearest guest services booth.

expected_outcome.value: The child is brought to a safe, designated location.

nodes.task_description: Agent at the booth makes a general announcement over the PA system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes an announcement like, 'We have a lost child at the guest services booth at Section 101. If you are missing a child, please report to this location.'

nodes.task_description: Wait with the child until the parent or guardian arrives and verify their identity before reuniting them.

expected_outcome.value: The parent arrives, and after verification, is reunited with their child.
